content.full_text:
February 5, 2003

Sara Friedman
Capitol Webworks
926 J Street, Suite 907
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-02-311

Dear Ms. Friedman:

Thank you for your November 14, 2002, request for information on behalf of your clients regarding lobbying registration documents and whether they must be filed electronically.

Specifically, you ask whether a lobbying firm or lobbyist employer which lobbied in the 2001-2002 legislative session and intends to continue lobbying in the 2003-2004 legislative session, and was required to file lobbying reports electronically, is required to file registration documents electronically. This is a complex question that Commission staff recently answered in an advice letter to the Secretary of State's office. A copy of that correspondence is enclosed. (Daniels-Meade Advice Letter, No. A-02-310.)

After your review of the enclosed, if you have any additional questions, please feel free to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
